paper_title: Cell2Sentence: Teaching Large Language Models the Language of Biology
caveat: LLM fine-tuning is compute-heavy; use small variant (Pythia-160M/GPT-2) for fair compare. NOTE: crawl link was wrong (stanford_alpaca); corrected here.

paper_title: CellPLM: Pre-training of Cell Language Model Beyond Single Cells
caveat: GPU-heavy; weights on Dropbox (link-rot risk); fine-tune per dataset; bulk task needs head adaptation.

paper_title: Optimal marker gene selection for cell type discrimination (scGeneFit)
task_alignment: Direct - supervised marker selection then cell-type classification
caveat: Most conceptually aligned to SMART's marker-selection claim. 2020 freeze; crawl wrongly linked it to a Tree-Wasserstein paper - real paper is Dumitrascu 2021.

paper_title: A Simple and Comprehensive Benchmark for Single-Cell Transcriptomics
task_alignment: Adaptable - expression-classification benchmark with Transformer/GNN/CNN/linear baselines
caveat: Single-cell only; own CellXGene splits - re-run its baselines on SMART's data for fair numbers.

paper_title: Refinement Contrastive Learning of Cell-Gene Associations for Unsupervised Cell Type Identification
caveat: Unsupervised/clustering paradigm - report with clustering eval (ARI/NMI) not head-to-head accuracy.

paper_title: sciLaMA: Single-Cell Representation Learning Leveraging LLM Prior Knowledge
task_alignment: Adaptable - embedding then linear/kNN probe for cell type
caveat: Unsupervised embedding method; only fair as embedding+linear-probe on the single-cell task

paper_title: Comprehensive View Embedding Learning for Single-Cell Multimodal Integration
task_alignment: Adaptable - joint embedding then label transfer for cell type
caveat: Integration/embedding method; data gated behind Baidu Pan; needs post-hoc classifier.

paper_title: scCluBench: Comprehensive Benchmarking of Clustering Algorithms for scRNA-seq
caveat: Clustering paradigm - use for datasets + landscape citation
column14: do NOT claim beating its ARI/NMI as apples-to-apples.

paper_title: HEIST: A Graph Foundation Model for Spatial Transcriptomics and Proteomics
task_alignment: Off-task for SMART inputs - does cell-type + clinical outcome but needs spatial coordinates
caveat: Requires spatial coordinates; cannot run on SMART's coordinate-free vectors unless a spatial task is added.

paper_title: CLM-Access: A Specialized Foundation Model for Single-Cell ATAC-Seq
task_alignment: Off-task modality - scATAC chromatin accessibility not scRNA expression
caveat: Different input modality (ATAC vs RNA); cite as related single-cell foundation model

paper_title: scGPT: Toward Building a Foundation Model for Single-Cell Multi-omics via Generative AI
task_alignment: Direct - native cell-type annotation/classification from scRNA-seq via fine-tuning
reproducibility: High (code + multiple ckpts incl pan-cancer + tutorials)
caveat: GPU-heavy fine-tuning; canonical same-task foundation-model baseline SMART cites.

paper_title: scBERT as a Large-scale Pretrained Deep Language Model for Cell Type Annotation
task_alignment: Direct - purpose-built cell-type annotation from scRNA-seq
caveat: Repo unmaintained since 2022; Performer backbone; weights via gdrive.

paper_title: Large-scale Foundation Model on Single-cell Transcriptomics
task_alignment: Direct - cell embeddings with cell-type annotation downstream code
caveat: ~100M params over ~20k genes; weights on Figshare; old inference API discontinued (use local).

paper_title: Transfer Learning Enables Predictions in Network Biology
task_alignment: Direct - cell-type + cell-state/disease classification via in-silico fine-tuning
caveat: NOT A GITHUB REPO - canonical code is HuggingFace-only (github.com URL is 404); third-party GitHub mirrors exist but are unofficial.
